case_title: ROBERTO BELARMINO TOBAR RIVERA VS. RYAN BENJAMIN COLE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, ROBERTO BELARMINO TOBAR AS TO DEFENDANT COLE, RYAN BENJAMIN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERA, ROBERTO BELARMINO TOBAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLE, RYAN BENJAMIN AN INDIVIDUAL $535.80 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $760.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
